title: UoM Prediction Modelling and Causal Inference Group Handbook

title: Introduction
text: This is the lab handbook for the Prediction Modelling and Causal Inference research group at the University of Manchester. The aim of the handbook is to provide information for researchers and students within the group. For more general information about the research group please see our group website here.

title: UoM Prediction Modelling and Causal Inference Group Handbook
text:
authorship - link to IJCME recs
open access - link to library OA page
conferences - list common conferences attended by group e.g. YSM, RSS, ISCB, Memtab. link to dissemination fund page for RA’s
include note about predatory journals/ fake conferences - speak to supervisor if unsure if something’s legit
